The Tray.ai Platform API (also known as the Connectivity API or Tray APIs) provides direct programmatic REST access to Tray's connectors, authentication management, trigger subscriptions, user and workspace administration, and project/solution lifecycle operations. It enables developers to integrate Tray's 700+ pre-built service connectors into their own applications without using the Builder UI. All endpoints require Bearer token authentication.
